substep.title: Initialize the Workspace
substep.action: Ensure the disposable workspace exists: - Create .extern/ if absent. - Copy the workspace guidance for future sessions: `cp {base_dir}/assets/workspace-agents.md .extern/AGENTS.md` (only if not already present). - Ensure .gitignore includes `.extern/` (append if missing).

substep.title: Clone the Repository
substep.action:
Derive the directory name {org}-{repo} per references/extern-catalog.md clone-naming. Shallow-clone:
git clone --single-branch --depth 1 {url} .extern/{org-repo}/
Use full history only when the study topic is the project's history itself. If the clone fails (bad URL, network, auth), emit to stdout and stop:
CLONE_FAILED Repo: {repo} Error: {git error, one line}
Reuse an existing clone in .extern/{org-repo}/ if one is already present and current — do not re-clone needlessly.
